case_title: NESTEROV, VICTOR VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NESTEROV, VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BRONFELD, LEON INSPECTOR, S F POLICE DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-28-2006, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-15-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE CITY NEEDS ADDITIONAL TIME TO INVESTIGATE THIS CLAIM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NESTEROV, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BRONFELD, LEON INSPECTOR, S F POLICE DEPARTMENT $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $595.00, THE COURT DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST INSPECTOR LEON BRONFELD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARITES.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
AFTER RULING ON MOTION, PLEASE FORWARD TO APPEAL SECTION.
INFORMAL MEMORANDUM IN OPPOSITION TO PLFT'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT ADDRESSED TO COMM SLAVIT FILED ONLY.
NOTICE FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED BY COURT. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28161, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NESTEROV, VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $778.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,278.50, 675.00 ATTORNEY FEES, AND $7500.00 WAS REDUCED FROM THE ASKED 8640.00 TO THE STATITORY ALLOWED CLAIM. EXHHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
